twitter_thread: 71% of side hustles fail within 3 months, with 40% of those burning over $5k.
Validate your idea with 10 customer interviews and a $100 paid prototype, like I did with my last project.
Set a $1k 'stop loss': if you don't see $500/mo revenue within 3 months, kill the project and cut losses.
I started with a $300/month marketing budget and iterated based on customer feedback, not guesswork.
Use Stripe to process $1,000 in payments within the first month, or reassess your pricing strategy.
Focus on high-margin services like consulting, where experts charge $100-$250/hour.
What's the most profitable side hustle you've started or seen? #sidehustle #finance
